basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist III (Non-Medical) & Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Delhi is recruiting 03 Project Research Scientists (02 at Level III and 01 at Level II) for a biomedical engineering project involving additively manufactured porous implants, rabbit femur implantation, and osseointegration evaluation. Candidates with relevant Ph.D. or Masters experience in orthopedics, biomechanics, and implant design can apply.

age_limit.details: Age limit: 45 years (for Level III as mentioned).

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Strong background in biomechanical engineering, implant design, micro-CT analysis, and related experimental/computational work
qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in orthopedics biomechanics and implant design and related domains from CFTIs and other reputed universities with publications in peer-reviewed journals in the domain of orthopedic biomechanics and implant design; expertise in mandibular biomechanics, micro-CT scanning, and developing CT-specific patent-specific implants; the application should clearly mention the latest research experience. Age limit: 45 years.

selection_process: The candidates who are interested to apply should download Form No. IRD/REC-4 from the IRD Website and submit the duly filled form with complete information by email. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for short-listing of eligible candidates. Only short-listed candidates will be informed for online interview.
how_to_apply: The candidates who are interested to apply for the above post should download Form No. IRD/REC-4 from the IRD Website of IIT Delhi and submit the duly filled form with complete information regarding educational qualifications indicating percentage of marks/division, details of work experience etc. by e-mail with advertisement No. on the subject line to Prof. Kaushik Mukherjee at email id: [email protected]. Last Date: 20 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.
important_instructions: Appointment shall be on contractual basis with consolidated pay, renewable yearly or upto the duration of the project, whichever is earlier. The posts may be downgraded as per discretion of the Selection Committee if none of the candidate is found suitable. 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates. In case of selection of a retired/superannuated government employee, his/her salary will be fixed as per prevailing IRD norms. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for short-listing of eligible candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: IIT Delhi invites applications from Indian nationals for project appointments under the ICMR-funded project. Appointment shall be on contractual basis with consolidated pay, renewable yearly or upto the duration of the project, whichever is earlier.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Delhi is recruiting 03 Project Research Scientists (02 at Level III and 01 at Level II) for a biomedical engineering project involving additively manufactured porous implants, rabbit femur implantation, and osseointegration evaluation. Candidates with relevant Ph.D. or Masters experience in orthopedics, biomechanics, and implant design can apply.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_delhi: Implantation of the additively manufactured porous implant with biotechnology-inspired functional lattice structures on rabbits femur and evaluation of its osseointegration (RP05015G)
Project Research Scientist III (Non-Medical) & Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical)
Level III: Rs. 78,000/- p.m. plus HRA @30% Level II: Rs. 67,000/- p.m. plus HRA @30%

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D. in orthopedics biomechanics and implant design and related domains from CFTIs and other reputed universities with publications in peer-reviewed journals in the domain of orthopedic biomechanics and implant design; expertise in mandibular biomechanics, micro-CT scanning, and developing CT-specific patent-specific implants; the application should clearly mention the latest research experience. Age limit: 45 years.

Masters having five years research experience (doctoral thesis duration, if any, will be counted towards research experience) in injury biomechanics and related domains from CFTIs and other reputed universities; expertise in developing CT-based patent-specific implants and fatigue analysis and LS-Dyna-based dynamic FE evaluation; at least one publication in the allied domain.
Strong background in biomechanical engineering, implant design, micro-CT analysis, and related experimental/computational work

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit: 45 years (for Level III as mentioned).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The candidates who are interested to apply should download Form No. IRD/REC-4 from the IRD Website and submit the duly filled form with complete information by email. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for short-listing of eligible candidates. Only short-listed candidates will be informed for online interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Appointment shall be on contractual basis with consolidated pay, renewable yearly or upto the duration of the project, whichever is earlier. The posts may be downgraded as per discretion of the Selection Committee if none of the candidate is found suitable. 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates. In case of selection of a retired/superannuated government employee, his/her salary will be fixed as per prevailing IRD norms. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for short-listing of eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the completed applications by email is 20 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Research Scientist positions are available at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There are 03 positions (02 at Level III and 01 at Level II).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Research Scientist III at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Rs. 78,000/- p.m. plus HRA @30%.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Project Research Scientist III?
faq.answer: Ph.D. in orthopedics biomechanics and implant design with relevant publications and expertise.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for the positions at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: “Implantation of the additively manufactured porous implant with biotechnology-inspired functional lattice structures on rabbits femur and evaluation of its osseointegration”.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist vacancy?
faq.answer: Download Form No. IRD/REC-4 and submit the duly filled form by email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. What funding agency is supporting the project at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: ICMR.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for Project Research Scientist positions?
faq.answer: Age limit: 45 years (for Level III).

faq.question: Q9. Is the Project Research Scientist position at IIT Delhi permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is on contractual basis, renewable yearly or upto the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Project Investigator for the ICMR project at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Prof. Kaushik Mukherjee.
